title: Hikaru no Go: Hokuto Hai e no Michi
titleRomaji: Hikaru no Go: Hokuto Hai e no Michi
titleNative: ヒカルの碁 北斗杯への道
synonyms: Hikaru no Go: Journey to the North Star Cup
synopsis: Hikaru is given a phone call asking him to appear in the Japan/China/Korea Junior's Tournament but he finds out he will have to take place in a preliminary tournament to choose Japan's three contestants. Upon discussing this with Akira, he discovers that Akira has already been chosen for the tournament and will not be taking place in the preliminaries. Hikaru then decides not to visit Akira's Go Salon until he takes his place on the team with Akira. That may be tougher than originally planned, as not only does Hikaru have to battle with old friends for one of two coveted spots, but he may have a new challenger, in a promising player from the Kansai Go Institute. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Slam Dunk: National Domination! Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleRomaji: SLAM DUNK: Zenkoku Seiha Da! Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleEnglish: Slam Dunk: National Domination! Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleNative: SLAM DUNK 全国制覇だ! 桜木花道
synonyms: สแลมดังก์ เดอะ มูฟวี่ ซากุรางิสุดยอดนักบาส ระดับประเทศ
synopsis: Set during the Inter High Championships, Shohoku take on Tsukubu, one of this year's dark horses. It's a clash of acquaintances as Anzai will face his former student which is now the coach of Tsukubu, while Akagi & Kogure meet Godai their former classmate and Tsukubu's captain. Finally Sakuragi is irked by the presence of Nango, Tsukubu's center, who vies for Haruko's attention. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Slam Dunk: Shohoku Maximum Crisis! Burn Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleRomaji: SLAM DUNK: Shouhoku Saidai no Kiki! Moero Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleEnglish: Slam Dunk: Shohoku Maximum Crisis! Burn Sakuragi Hanamichi
titleNative: SLAM DUNK 湘北最大の危機! 燃えろ桜木花道
synonyms: Slam Dunk Shouhoku Kaidai no Kiki! Moeru Sakuragi Hanamichi
สแลมดังก์ เดอะ มูฟวี่ อันตรายของโชโฮคุและความเร่าร้อนของซากุรางิ
synopsis: After losing the titanic match against Kainan High, Team Shohoku and a newly shaven Hanamichi Sakuragi are challenged to an exhibition match by virtual basketball unknowns Ryoukufu High. Coach Anzai sees this as an opportunity for Shohoku to regain their confidence, but Ryoukufu are revealed to have a newly assembled championship calibre lineup and may give Sakuragi & Co their toughest test yet. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleRomaji: SLAM DUNK: Hoero Basketman-damashii! Hanamichi to Rukawa no Atsuki Natsu
titleEnglish: Slam Dunk: Roar!! Basket Man Spirit
titleNative: SLAM DUNK 吠えろバスケットマン魂! 花道と流川の熱き夏
synonyms: Slam Dunk: Hoero Basketman Tamashii!! Hanamichi to Rukawa no Nekki NatsuRoar Basketman's Soul - Hanamichi and Rukawa's Burning Summer
สแลมดังก์ เดอะ มูฟวี่ ฤดูร้อนอันระอุของรุคาว่ากับซากุรางิ
synopsis: Ichiro Mizusawa, a player from Rukawa's old junior high school, Tomigoaka, is diagnosed with a crippling leg condition and wants to play one last game with Rukawa. Hanamichi sets out to help the boy and fulfill his wish. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Inazuma Eleven GO vs Danball Senki W
titleRomaji: Inazuma Eleven GO vs Danball Senki W
titleNative: 劇場版 イナズマイレブンGO vs ダンボール戦機W
synonyms: Gekijouban Inazuma Eleven Go vs Danball Senki W
synopsis: The "Inazuma Legend Japan" that won the FFI one day and the "New Inazuma Eleven", that played through the Holy Road Tournament are having an exhibition match. But suddenly a lot of little objects appear and start attacking the stadium. They were the little robots "LBX", a technology never saw before in that world. Tenma and his friends try to respond to the attack, but the little robots continue to appear one after another, until Yamano Ban appears to save them. The strongest soccer team and the strongest LBX army are now united, and a fierce battle is about to begin!

title: Pretty Rhythm: Rainbow Live
titleNative: プリティーリズム・レインボーライブ
synopsis: Naru Ayase is an 8th grader who can see the colors of music when she listens to it. For Naru, who is extremely good at decorating, becoming the owner of a shop like Dear Crown was her dream. One day, she finds out that the manager of a newly-opened shop is recruiting middle school girls who can do Prism Dance, and immediately applies. Naru begins to Prism Dance at the audition, and an aura she's never experienced spreads out in front of her. At that moment, a mysterious girl named Rinne asks her if she can see "rainbow music". (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Nasu: Summer in Andalusia
titleNative: 茄子 アンダルシアの夏
synopsis: Pepe is a Spanish cyclist competing in the Vuelta a España, a multi-stage Iberian cycling race similar to the Tour de France. He is a support rider for one of the teams competing in the race, and his role is to assist the team's top rider in winning the overall race. As the story unfolds, the racers are set to ride through Pepe's home town in Andalusia on the same day as the wedding of his elder brother Ángel to his former girlfriend Carmen. Their relationship was a factor in his decision to leave the town to pursue professional cycling, and the wedding is a frustrating reminder that his career hasn't turned out as he would have liked. Now, with the sponsor planning to drop him from the team and his family and friends cheering him on, Pepe abandons his assigned role and strives for glory. (Source: Anime News Network, edited)

synopsis: The story centers on the sport of women's cycling, which debuted in Japan shortly after World War II. However, organized competitions folded after just 15 years and laid dormant for several decades. Then the Rinkai! League launched to revive the sport. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Hoop Days
titleNative: ディア・ボーイズ
synopsis: Dear Boys is a story about determination to excel in a sport in which you love and also have fun at the same time. The tension as underdogs in the whole prefecture with only 5 players. How this team struggle to win, setbacks, teamwork, a purpose in life. This story relates to our lives as we strive to do our best, not just in sports, school but also relationships between friends and ones we love. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
titleRomaji: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
titleNative: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE
synonyms: LOS ANGELES LAKERS x ONE PIECE Special Collab Anime
synopsis: On February 28, ONE PIECE took over Crypto.com Arena for a special game night collab event with the Los Angeles Lakers. The Lakers ended up taking down their opponents in a close 106-102 game, and maybe some of that juice is thanks to the presence of the Straw Hats and a special piece of animation created for the event. The anime short—which depicts a Lakers uniform-clad Luffy in an intense basketball match against a team of Marines—can be seen in all its 30 seconds of glory. Can our captain Luffy take home the win? (Source: Crunchyroll News, ONE PIECE Official ENG YouTube description, edited)

title: Shoubushi Densetsu Tetsuya
titleNative: 勝負師伝説哲也
synopsis: In the year 1947, the people of Shinjuku are down on their luck. With little money to buy food or necessities, some resort to gambling in order to survive. Traveling Tetsuya chooses to spend his time at Mahjong parlors where he is wiping the floor clean with his adversaries. However, when Tetsuya meets the intensely skilled Boushu-san, he realizes that his skills are still lacking. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: グラゼニ
synopsis: The "baseball money survival" story focuses on a baseball team that operates as a highly-stratified society, where the player's performance determines his annual salary. The story follows an eight-year relief pitcher with an odd left-handed side-arm throw as he fights to survive under the team's strict system. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Future GPX Cyber Formula
titleNative: 新世紀GPXサイバーフォーミュラ
synopsis: 14-year-old Kazami Hayato is the youngest driver of Cyber Formula, a Grand Prix in which each vehicle is equipped with computers to aid in racing. With the help of Asurada, the most advanced cybernavigation system, and team Sugo, Hayato races to become the winner of the 10th Cyber Formula Grand Prix. Along the way, Hayato will have to learn what it truly means to be a racer and that victory cannot be achieved simply by driving the best machine. In addition, Kazami will have to gain the respect of the veteran racers, thwart those who attempt to steal Asurada, and participate in races outside of Cyber Formula. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Shin Captain Tsubasa
titleNative: 新・キャプテン翼
synopsis: Shin CT takes place at the U-16 world cup in France. After some friendly matches in Germany, Japan defeats one opponent after another and finally reaches the final round against Germany. After hard matches against Italian and French top players, the German team seems to be even more supreme. The giant goal keeper Moeller, the all round ace Kalz and Europe's best player and forward Schneider offer the Japanese team an extremely hard match, but in the end Japan wins 3:2. (Source: Anime News Network)

tags.name: Magic
tags.description: Prominently features magical elements or the use of magic.

tags.name: Dragons
tags.description: Prominently features mythical reptiles which generally have wings and can breathe fire.

tags.name: Delinquents

title: Beyblade Burst Rise
titleNative: ベイブレードバーストGT(ガチ)
synopsis: Legendary Blader Valt Aoi has been training the next generation of elite Bladers at Spain's BC Sol. One day, rookie Bladers Dante Koryu and Delta Zakuro witness Valt unleashing his newly-evolved Gamma Bey, Sword Valtryek. To their surprise, Valtryek radiates a golden light as it rockets around the stadium. Inspired by the limitless possibilities of this “Hyper-Flux” state, both Dante and Delta seek the same bond with their Beys. Dante and his partner, Ace Dragon, set off for Japan, the birthplace of Beyblade. But the path to glory won't be easy; plenty of tough competitors and Gamma Beys stand in their way, among them some of the best to ever let it rip. Dante soon realizes he'll have to do whatever it takes to deepen his bond with Dragon. Do Dante and Dragon have what it takes to overcome these challenges? And will they ever achieve Hyper-Flux? Here begins the story of Dante and Dragon's rise to the peak of the Blading world. (Source: Total Licensing)

tags.name: Male Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is male.

tags.name: Proxy Battle
tags.description: A proxy battle is a battle where humans use creatures/robots to do the fighting for them, either by commanding those creatures/robots or by simply evolving them/changing them into battle mode.

tags.name: Kids
tags.description: Target demographic is young children.

tags.name: School
tags.description: Partly or completely set in a primary or secondary educational institution.

tags.name: Primarily Child Cast
tags.description: Main cast is mostly composed of characters below a high school age.

tags.name: Female Protagonist
tags.description: Main character is female.
